programme.desc: Cuando Vanesa nace los médicos descubren que carece de útero y ovarios, pero tiene testículos ya en la adolescencia, Vanesa descubre de manera muy dolorosa que es una chica intersex.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cuídate de la gente buena que la mala diosito te la señala
programme.desc: Una joven trabaja para ayudar a su madre que está enferma, un día es asaltada y pierde el dinero del alquiler, por lo que son sacadas de su casa. El destino une a la chica con un joven, quien resulta ser el hermano del ladrón que le robó el dinero.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Acuérdate, nuera, que también serás suegra
programme.desc: En un arranque de inseguridad y miedo, una joven le hace creer a su novio que su madre quiere separarlos. El joven tendrá que lidiar entre el amor de su madre y la obsesión de su novia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Ana sufre maltrato físico por parte de su esposo. Entonces, decide mudarse con sus hijos a casa de sus suegros.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Jamás se encuentra un brillante en el aire
programme.desc: Una joven ambiciosa se enamora de un joven que se dedica al robo de autos de lujo y, a pesar de saber lo que hace, ella se queda con él para recibir la vida que se merece. La joven pagará las consecuencias de involucrarse con un delincuente.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Tito el Bambino y Adrián Uribe
programme.desc: Durante la emisión se conocerán los primeros equipos sentenciados. Además no faltará la música interpretada por los pequeños, baile y chistes con la participación de los jueces. Entre los invitados se encuentran Tito el Bambino y Adrian Uribe.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Pepe Aguilar, Danna Paola y Dulce María
programme.desc: Este programa cuenta con grandes invitados como Pepe Aguilar, Danna Paola, Dulce María, Erick Rubín, Ha Ash, Kpaz de la Sierra y Pablo Montero, los cuales interpretan una canción junto a los pequeños.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Pierre Ángelo, Albertano y el Compayito
programme.desc: Guerra de chistes, sketch cómico con Pierre Angelo, baile y canciones complementan este divertido programa. Como invitados especiales: Albertano y el Compayito. Por último, Gloria Trevi nombrará a alguien como 'Gigante de la Noche'.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños gigantes presentan un popurrí con los éxitos de OV7, grupo invitados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Teresa Rodríguez relata la historia de la recaptura de Joaquín Guzmán Loera 'El Chapo'. Desde el escape de 'El Chapo' junto con 'El Cholo' de la casa en Culiacán hasta la captura de ambos delincuentes en un hotel de paso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hay veces que las familias son separadas por situaciones fortuitas. Alejandro Muñoz es un periodista cuyo propósito en su programa de televisión es reunir a familias separadas por diversos motivos. Él cuenta algunas de sus experiencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La patrulla fronteriza de Estados Unidos tiene registro de que la mayoría de indocumentados que cruzan la frontera son centroamericanos. Dentro de esta población hay muchos menores de edad que viajan solos para reunirse con sus familiares.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En Nueva York existe una importante cantidad de población inmigrante proveniente de Casa Blanca, un pueblo del estado de Puebla en México. Ellos desean reunirse de nuevo con sus padres después de muchos años de no verlos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La inmigración a Estados Unidos se ha convertido en una industria con un enfoque monetario. En este episodio se dan a conocer las implicaciones monetarias además de los estragos emocionales que deja en los inmigrantes.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Salmo 100 es una organización que lleva mensajes de paz y reconciliación. Las historias de Daniel, Adrián o Giovanni son ejemplos de que usa Salmo 100 para ayudar a más personas que quieren salir del mundo del crimen organizado en la frontera.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Las redadas que realizan los agentes de migración han hecho que el miedo tome muchos vecindarios de Estados Unidos. Las historias de quienes han sido deportados son contadas. También, las historias de quienes viven temerosos de ser deportados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El temor a las deportaciones masivas aumentó después de que el Departamento de Seguridad Nacional anunciara nuevas reglas que priorizan las expulsiones de inmigrantes indocumentados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Poco a poco el ser humano termina con el planeta que habita, hoy, el plástico es uno de los mayores enemigos, no se degrada, no desaparece y ahora llena los mares, amenazando su flora y fauna sin control.

programme.title: Lo mejor de Primer impacto
programme.desc: Las noticias y reportajes más impactantes de Estados Unidos y del mundo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El fiscal general de México sufre una derrota en un caso muy importante para él. Mauro Castillo habla sobre su participación en la película "Encanto".

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Poco a poco el ser humano termina con el planeta que habita, hoy, el plástico es uno de los mayores enemigos, no se degrada, no desaparece y ahora llena los mares, amenazando su flora y fauna sin control.

programme.title: Noticias Univision presenta: Luigi Mangione, anatomía de un crimen

programme.title: De mochila con Tony
programme.desc: Una visita al estado de California, en la Costa Oeste de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: De mochila con Tony
programme.desc: Una mochila llena de aventuras y momentos muy especiales. Se exploran diferentes rincones de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: El ABC de la inmigración
programme.desc: Todo lo que debes saber para tu proceso migratorio. Todo sobre las leyes migratorias vigentes en Estados Unidos.

programme.title: North by Northpole: A Dial "S" Mystery
programme.desc: Santa Claus regresa para ayudar a una pareja a resolver un misterio y encontrar el amor. El deseo de Zoey de organizar el Festival de Navidad perfecto se ve comprometido cuando choca con su compañero Dalton, mientras ocurren cosas sospechosas que podrían detener el festival.

programme.title: Resting Place

programme.title: Love's Unfolding Dream

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Tres niños huérfanos se quedan temporalmente con una pareja (Dean Cain, Jean Louisa Kelly) durante la Navidad.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: Una novelista cree que sus días tortuosos de escribir libros junto a su exnovio habían terminado hace tiempo.

programme.title: When My Love Blooms EP1
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran como estudiantes universitarios, Ji-su se enamora locamente de Jae-hyun.

programme.title: HAECHAN The 1st Album 'TASTE'
programme.desc: 4. Love Beyond 11. Outro (Back In The Studio)5. Roll With Me The title 「TASTE」 carries a dual meaning: sharing the musical “tastes” Haechan has cultivated from his childhood dream of becoming a singer to the present, and inviting listeners to “taste” the very first music he has created as a solo artist. Through this album, fans can fully experience Haechan's world of music. 6. Intermission 9. Should Be 3. ADRENALINE 8. WYN? (Feat. HAON) 2. CRZY [Track List] 10. Grey Rain 7. Talented NCT Haechan has released his first solo album 「TASTE」, featuring 11 tracks including the title song *CRZY*. The album highlights Haechan's unique musical color, built around his favorite genre, R&B, and expands into diverse moods of soul, hip-hop, and jazz. 1. Camera Lights

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way. NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.”

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles, all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.desc: The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles, all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: Al Jarreau, Tom Canning, Peter Robinson & Ralph Humphrey
programme.sub-title: Al Jarreau - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1981, American singer and Grammy Award winner Al Jarreau gave an unforgettable performance for the audience of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague, the Netherlands.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential male jazz and pop vocalists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Delight in the expressive beauty and emotional depth of Chet Baker's rendition of “Time After Time” and “You Don't Know What Love Is", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium in 1964 and in Rome, Italy in 1956 respectively. Revel in Frank Sinatra's iconic version of “I've Got You Under My Skin". Immerse yourself in Dizzy Gillespie's dynamic performance of “Let Me Outta Here”, recorded live in Denmark in 1970. Enjoy Tony Bennett's unforgettable performance of “It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing)” at London's majestic Royal Albert Hall in 1974. Let the haunting beauty of Nat King Cole's 1957 performance of “Autumn Leaves” and Louis Armstrong's performance of “Basin Street Blues” from 1959 delight you. Dean Martin's smooth vocal stylings will enthrall you as he performs the jazz standard “Wrap Your Troubles In Dreams". Witness the electrifying energy of Sammy Davis Jr.'s performance of “Too Close For Comfort”. Join us for this unforgettable musical experience that you'll surely cherish!

programme.title: Thelonious Monk, Charlie Rouse, Ben Riley & Larry Gales
programme.desc: The idiosyncratic pianist and composer Thelonious Monk (1917-1982) is one of the all-time greats of jazz. His music went largely misunderstood for the first 15 years of his career, after which he was rightly hailed as a genius, and received credit as a founding father of bebop. Several concerts from his 1966 European tour were recorded for television, featuring his quartet of Charles Rouse (tenor saxophone), Lawrence Gales (bass) and Benjamin Riley (drums). His quartet performed Epistrophy, 'Round Midnight, and Lulu's Back in Town in Warsaw for Polish television on April 4, 1966. On April 17, the same quartet performed a short set in Copenhagen for Danish television, featuring Lulu's Back in Town, Don't Blame Me, and Epistrophy.

programme.title: Yumi Ito
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Charlie Parker
programme.desc: The documentary The Story of Jazz is a seamless array of performances, commentary, and compelling historic insights about jazz, zooming in on the cross-cultural influences that produced this constantly evolving and enduring music. Many call jazz the greatest art form of the 20th century. This absorbing weave of sounds, rare film clips, stills and interviews shows how this truly American expression spread to become a universal, musical language, from the New Orleans traditions, stride, swing, boogie woogie, big band, jump band, blues, bebop, Afro-Cuban, cool, and free-form, to jazz vocalists and dancers… Never before have the filmed comments of so many important great jazz artists been assembled for one project, and never before has the history of jazz been told as vividly and with such attention to historic detail.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Salif Keita, Souleymane Dournbia, Lansine Kouyate & N'Doumbé
programme.desc: Salif Keita's music is a rich combination of traditional Malian music with European and American influences. We can hear this in the instrumentation of Keita's music, which varies from traditional West-African instruments to Western European ones. The Malian singer was cast out by his family because of his albinism. In 1967 he moved to Bamako, where he started his musical career and joined Les Ambassadeurs (Internationaux). He achieved international acknowledgement with this band in the 1970s. After spending a couple of years in Ivory Coast, Salif has found his home base in Paris since 1984. During this 2010 concert, he proves to be rightfully referred to as “The Golden Voice of Africa”.

programme.title: Billie Holiday
programme.desc: “God Bless The Child”, “Foolin' Myself”, and “I Loves You, Porgy”: timeless songs that were made classics by the inimitable Billie Holiday. ‘Lady Day', as her loyal friend and musical partner Lester Young nicknamed her, was a highly original jazz and pop singer. In a career that spanned most of the 1930s, 1940s and 1950s, she displayed an uncanny ability to convey emotion through her voice. Her vocals, which were strongly inspired by instrumental jazz, are admired for their deeply personal and intimate sound. This compilation features recordings from the 1950s of Billie Holiday singing a string of her greatest successes. Enjoy this unique footage of one of jazz's all-time greats!

programme.title: Claudio Abbado, Berliner Philharmoniker, Mirella Freni & Christine Schäfer
programme.sub-title: Gala from Berlin 1998 - Songs of Love and Desire
programme.desc: Featuring W. A. Mozart and Giuseppe Verdi, love is the theme of this 1998 New Year's Eve concert. Maestro Claudio Abbado selected two of the best Mozart interpreters, Christine Schäfer and Simon Keenlyside, for this traditionally meaningful event. Marcelo Álvarez from Argentina, who some compare to a young Domingo, sings highlights of the tenor repertoire, and Italian prima donna Mirella Freni tops the occasion with a breath-taking performance of the letter scene from Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Eugen Onegin.

programme.title: London Symphony Orchestra & Michael Tilson Thomas
programme.desc: American conductor Michael Tilson Thomas leads the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in an energetic performance of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's folk-infused Symphony No. 2 in C minor, Op. 17. Written in 1872, the work is nicknamed 'Little Russian' as the composer used several folk tunes from Ukraine, then known as ‘Little Russia'. This performance was recorded at LSO St Luke's, London, on May 31, 2021.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98. Brahms completed his last symphony in 1885. He conducted the successful premiere of the piece in the German city of Meiningen in October of the same year. The symphony's finale movement is a chaconne, a variation form that reflects the composer's fascination with Baroque music. In this movement, Brahms borrowed an 8-measure theme from J. S. Bach's cantata ‘Nach dir, Herr, verlanget mich', BWV 150. The movement opens with the theme and then presents a set of variations all set over the same repeated theme in the bass. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Douglas Boyd, Orchestre de chambre de Paris, Accentus Chamber Choir & Carolyn Sampson
programme.desc: Composer George Frideric Handel's oratorio Messiah, HWV 56 is his best-known work. He wrote this choral masterpiece in just 24 days in 1741. Following its premiere in Dublin in 1742, the work has been immensely popular. The oratorio's three parts deal with the birth, death, and resurrection of Jesus Christ. Charles Jennens' libretto is based on texts from the Old and New Testament. In this performance, English conductor Douglas Boyd leads chamber choir Accentus and Orchestre de chambre de Paris. The soloists are soprano Carolyn Sampson, mezzosoprano Paula Murrihy, tenor Allan Clayton, and bass Matthew Rose. Captured at the Philharmonie de Paris on December 22, 2015, this performance underlines the enduring majesty of Handel's masterpiece.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 5 in A major, Op. 18, No. 5 String Quartet No. 4 in C minor, Op. 18, No. 4 and String Quartet No. 12 in E-flat major, Op. 127. This concert was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on December 17, 2020.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Fall in the Forest 2
programme.desc: Fall in the Forest is an ultra-relaxing two-hour long dynamically changing film which sweeps viewers from one golden yellow autumn mountain scene to the next. Containing nature sounds only, it's a perfect video to turn on and add the beauty and warmth of Autumn to any environment. Filmed in the mountains of Alberta: Banff & Jasper National Parks, as well as in King's Canyon National Park, in California

programme.title: Serene Waters: Diablo Lake: Washington
programme.desc: Feel the serene calm of the Diablo Lake surrounded by majestic mountains.

programme.title: Pure Relaxation
programme.desc: Relax to the slow descent of the sun over calm waters.

programme.title: A Day in San Diego 2
programme.desc: Transform your TV into a beautiful and relaxing window to the best city in the world - San Diego - with this 3-hour long video featuring 12 different 15 minute scenes from the city's best beaches: Coronado Beach, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Blacks Beach, Ocean Beach, Sunset Cliffs, Torrey Pines, and more.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise 1
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sea turtles, for 2 full hours of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: The Cliff
programme.desc: From atop a cliff, enjoy a stunning view of turquoise waters and blue skies as far as the eyes can see.

programme.title: Crystal Blue Waves
programme.desc: Transform your TV or monitor into a vividly blue and relaxing window to the glorious ocean, with this ultra high quality 4K video containing the sights & sounds of big waves breaking along a coastal pier on a perfect blue-sky day.

programme.title: Living Creatures—Feathered Friends
programme.desc: Celebrate the natural beauty and diversity of birds. Explore their symbolism and captivating nature. From the elegance of birds in flight to the intricacies of their plumage, each artwork immerses viewers in the world of these winged creatures.

programme.title: Living Creatures—Wings of Color
programme.desc: A captivating collection celebrating the vibrant beauty and symbolism of butterflies. Bursting with color, each piece captures their delicate wings, graceful flight, and transformative spirit—evoking renewal, freedom, and nature's fleeting wonders.

programme.title: Elegant Objects—Part 1
programme.desc: Indulge in a mesmerizing collection of artwork that unveils the eternal allure of still life compositions and enchanting objects. Each is a symphony of form, color, and light, celebrating the everyday.

programme.title: Living Creatures—Part 1
programme.desc: Embark on a whimsical journey through an art collection featuring cuddly, furry friends, enchanting scaly creatures, and fantastical beings. Each piece captivates with its unique charm, inviting viewers into a world where imagination knows no bounds.

programme.title: Shades of Red
programme.desc: Explore a vibrant, passionate art collection where the color red takes center stage. The works showcase red's emotive power, from fiery abstract paintings to crimson-hued photographs, offering a visual journey through the spectrum of human emotions.

programme.title: Shades of Yellow
programme.desc: Capturing the brightness and joyfulness of yellow through various hues and textures, evoking a sense of warmth, optimism, and playfulness.

programme.title: Shades of Green
programme.desc: Explore a stunning art collection celebrating the color green. From lush landscapes to abstract works, this collection showcases the versatility and serenity of green in a myriad of artistic expressions.

programme.title: Places I've Never Been—Canada
programme.desc: From mountain peaks to coastal shores, explore Canada's vast beauty. This collection of stunning cityscapes and wild landscapes takes you on a visual journey through the Great White North, satisfying your wanderlust from the comfort of home.
